title: schizoglossum bidens subsp. productum
intro: Schizoglossum bidens subsp. productum, also known as Devil's Claw, is a plant species that belongs to the Apocynaceae family and is native to southern Africa. The medicinal properties of Schizoglossum bidens subsp. productum lie in its roots, which contain iridoid glycosides, particularly harpagoside, responsible for its anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects. The health benefits of this plant include relief from pain, inflammation, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to reduce fever and promote wound healing. Schizoglossum bidens subsp. productum can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tablet, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
